message:
feat(tests): add service-layer integration tests with real DB (bd-1vr1.7)

17 tests covering history and DCG services against a real temp SQLite DB
with zero mock.module usage. Sets DB_FILE_NAME before service imports so
the singleton db module connects to the test database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
